title: 5-Pack Grey Plastic Dish Brush Set, Dish Scrubber and Washing up Brushes for Kitchen, Sink and Countertops with Firm Bristles and Sturdy Plastic Handle (Pack of 5 Fantail Dish Brushes)
features: Durable and Hard-Wearing Kitchen Brush – The dish brushes for washing up are made with high-quality plastic handles and firm nylon bristles to withstand the purpose for daily use and a long-lasting dish cleaner.

Well Thought and Minimalist Design for a Kitchen Washing Brush with Handle – These kitchen brushes for dishes have 27cm long plastic ergonomic curved handles with a shaped grip to easily hold even with wet hands. Each dish washing up brush also has wide fantail style bristles to get into the hard-to-reach surface, a built-in scrapper at the top of the sink brush to remove stubborn marks and dried-on food; and a hanging hook at the tip of the handle for easier storage.

Flexible Use and Multipurpose Dish Brush – If you are looking for a multipurpose washing up brush for the kitchen, this is the right one for you. With these high-quality dish brushes, a variety of effective uses are possible. It can be a dishwashing brush, sink brush, pot brush, dish cleaner, kitchen scrubber and even tile cleaner brush; whenever you need it.

Good Deal Dishwasher Brush Set – With the 5-Pack Grey Plastic Dish Brush Set, we offer great value for your money. Having an affordable price and durable feature at the same time, it is a cost-effective option when it comes to effectively cleaning any dish, pot, or pan within your kitchen.

Trusted Brand – Manufactured by the Dustpan and Brush Store that are proven with delivering high-quality brushes, brooms and dustpans, these dishes brush will surely meet your expectations for efficient cleaning of your dishes, kitchen, sink and countertops.
